title: Ensure that the --service-account-extend-token-expiration parameter is set to false

input_row.title: Ensure that the --service-account-extend-token-expiration parameter is set to false
input_row.description: By default Kubernetes extends service account token lifetimes to one year to aid in transition from the legacy token settings.
input_row.rationale: This default setting is not ideal for security as it ignores other settings related to maximum token lifetime and means that a lost or stolen credential could be valid for an extended period of time.
input_row.audit: Run the following command on the Control Plane node: ps -ef | grep kube-apiserver Verify that the --service-account-extend-token-expiration argument is set to false.
input_row.remediation: Edit the API server pod specification file /etc/kubernetes/manifests/kube-apiserver.yaml on the Control Plane node and set the --service-account-extend-token-expiration parameter to false. --service-account-extend-token-expiration=false
input_row.impact: Disabling this setting means that the service account token expiry set in the cluster will be enforced, and service account tokens will expire at the end of that time frame.
input_row.default_value: By default, this parameter is set to true

step1_initial_assessment:
**AUDIT APPROACH:** Automated

**APPROACH DECISION:**
- The audit mentions running a command on the Control Plane node to check the `--service-account-extend-token-expiration` parameter, which indicates that this property can be queried.
- The parameter is a standard Kubernetes API server flag, which can be verified through the API server manifest.
- The Kubernetes API and `kubectl` can be used to check the configuration of the API server.

**PROGRAM NAME:** k8s_api_server_service_account_extend_token_expiration_disabled

**AUTOMATION DETAILS:**
- Use `kubectl get pods -n kube-system -l component=kube-apiserver -o jsonpath='{.items[*].spec.containers[*].command}'` to retrieve the command-line arguments for the kube-apiserver.
- Check if the output contains `--service-account-extend-token-expiration=false`.
- Pass criteria: The output should include `--service-account-extend-token-expiration=false`.
- Fail criteria: The output does not include `--service-account-extend-token-expiration=false` or includes it set to true.
